fields.name: searchTerms
fields.label: Search Term Variations
fields.description: Alternative phrases that trigger this flow

fields.name: hasOptions
fields.label: Has Predefined Options
fields.description: Whether this type uses answer options (vs free text)

fields.name: introVideo
fields.label: Intro Video
fields.description: Path to the background video shown on the intro screen (e.g., /videos/Mattress_Shopping.mp4)

fields.name: avatarResponse
fields.label: Avatar Response
fields.description: What the avatar says when this option is selected. Supports {thisAnswer}, {previousAnswer}, etc.

fields.name: nextStepOverride
fields.label: Skip to Step (Optional)
fields.description: Step ID to jump to (for branching logic)

fields.name: scriptText
fields.label: Avatar Script
fields.description: What the avatar says. Supports variables.

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
